commands.review_summary:
The PR adds host-pressure refusal, temp-dir routing, opt-in native type-aware refusal, and focused tests across local tsgo and type-aware oxlint script wrappers, plus small lint/architecture cleanup.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +371, Other +334. Total +713 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible: current main runs the local tsgo wrapper without the new pressure-refusal path, and the PR body supplies Raspberry Pi terminal output for the after-fix refusal path. I did not recreate a pressured host during this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance and consolidation of a compatibility-sensitive local validation policy, not a narrow automated code repair.
